items.name: accordion
items.description: Vertically stacked, collapsible content sections

items.name: action-sheet
items.description: Bottom-rising sheet of discrete actions (iOS action-sheet pattern) with a Cancel button

items.name: alert
items.description: Highlights a short, important message inline

items.name: alert-dialog
items.description: Confirmation dialog requiring explicit user action; no light-dismiss

items.name: app-shell
items.description: Sticky-header + full-height side-nav + single-scroll-container layout with an animated, accessible nav toggle.

items.name: aspect-ratio
items.description: Constrains content to a fixed width-to-height ratio

items.name: avatar
items.description: Displays a user image with initials fallback

items.name: avatar-group
items.description: Overlapping stack of avatars with a max cap and an i18n-labelled +N overflow chip

items.name: badge
items.description: Small status label or category indicator

items.name: block-app-shell
items.description: Two-column layout with collapsible sidebar, nav links, and content area.

items.name: block-auth-login
items.description: Email + password login with remember-me checkbox and forgot-password link.

items.name: block-auth-signup
items.description: Full-name, email, password, confirm-password sign-up form with terms checkbox.

items.name: block-console-app
items.description: Carbon-parity console shell: ShellHeader + icon-rail SideNav + HeaderPanel notifications/switcher + collapsible aside + main content.

items.name: block-dashboard-charts
items.description: Dashboard layout with KPI tiles, line chart, bar chart, and pie chart.

items.name: block-dashboard-overview
items.description: Welcome header with four KPI stat cards (revenue, users, orders, conversion).

items.name: block-dashboard-table
items.description: Searchable, sortable, paginated data table with export button.

items.name: block-empty-dashboard
items.description: Dashboard page showing an empty state with a call-to-action button.

items.name: block-faq
items.description: Frequently-asked-questions section composed from the Accordion component, with a centered, readable measure.

items.name: block-login-page
items.description: Authentication login page with email and password form.

items.name: block-marketing-features
items.description: Three-column responsive feature grid with icon, title, and description per cell.

items.name: block-marketing-hero
items.description: Full-width hero with headline, subtitle, CTA pair, and trust badges.

items.name: block-notification-center
items.description: A list of notification alerts with a mark-all-read action.

items.name: block-page-with-breadcrumb
items.description: A centered content page with a breadcrumb navigation and page header.

items.name: block-pricing
items.description: Responsive three-tier pricing section composed from Card, Badge, and Button, with a highlighted featured plan.

items.name: block-settings-form-page
items.description: Settings page with profile form inside a two-column settings layout.

items.name: block-settings-profile
items.description: Two-section settings form: personal info fields + preference toggles.

items.name: block-sidebar-app
items.description: Full app shell with collapsible side navigation and top header.

items.name: block-site-footer
items.description: Multi-column site footer composed from Link and Separator, with a brand blurb, link columns, and a legal row.

items.name: block-stats-cards
items.description: Grid of KPI stat cards with trend badges.

items.name: block-testimonials
items.description: Responsive testimonial grid composed from Card and Avatar, with a quote and attribution per card.

items.name: block-users-table-page
items.description: Full users management page with table, search, and invite action.

items.name: blockquote
items.description: Quoted passage with optional attribution footer

items.name: bottom-sheet
items.description: Mobile bottom sheet with drag-to-resize detents, velocity-projected snapping, and drag-to-dismiss

items.name: breadcrumb
items.description: Shows the current page location within a navigation hierarchy

items.name: button
items.description: Triggers an action or event

items.name: button-group
items.description: Visually joins a set of related buttons into a single segmented control

items.name: calendar
items.description: An accessible standalone month-grid date picker.

items.name: card
items.description: Container for grouping related content

items.name: carousel
items.description: Scroll-snap slide deck with previous/next controls and dot indicators

items.name: chart-area-chart
items.description: Area chart with optional stacking, multi-series support, and hover tooltip.

items.name: chart-bar-chart
items.description: Bar chart with vertical/horizontal orientation, grouped or stacked modes, and multi-series support.

items.name: chart-boxplot
items.description: Box-and-whisker plot with five-number summary and outlier dots per series.

items.name: chart-bubble-chart
items.description: Bubble chart mapping x, y, and size dimensions; radius is area-proportional via sqrt scale.

items.name: chart-bullet
items.description: Bullet chart with background range bands, measure bar, and target tick.

items.name: chart-calendar
items.description: Calendar heatmap — a week-column grid of day cells colored by value (GitHub-style).

items.name: chart-candlestick
items.description: OHLC financial chart — each period a high–low wick and an open↔close body, coloured up/down.

items.name: chart-combo-chart
items.description: Combination bar + line chart on shared or dual y-axes.

items.name: chart-funnel
items.description: Vertical conversion funnel — each stage is a trapezoid narrowing toward the next, with optional conversion labels.

items.name: chart-gauge
items.description: A speedometer gauge — a value arc over a min–max sweep with threshold zones, ticks, and a needle.

items.name: chart-heatmap
items.description: Two-dimensional heatmap with band scales and color-mix cell interpolation.

items.name: chart-histogram
items.description: Frequency histogram using Freedman–Diaconis binning with hover tooltips.

items.name: chart-kpi
items.description: KPI card showing a primary metric with optional delta indicator, icon, and sparkline.

items.name: chart-line-chart
items.description: Time-series or numeric line chart with multi-series support, hover tooltip, and legend.

items.name: chart-meter
items.description: Progress meter in bar or gauge variant with threshold coloring.

items.name: chart-pie-chart
items.description: Pie or donut chart with hover segments and optional legend.

items.name: chart-polar
items.description: A polar coordinate plot — categories around the circle, value as radius. Bars (a rose), or a polar line/area.

items.name: chart-radar
items.description: Radar / spider chart with polar grid rings, spokes, and multi-series polygon overlays.

items.name: chart-radial-bar
items.description: Concentric radial bars (a circular gauge family) — each datum is a ring whose sweep is proportional to its value.

items.name: chart-sankey
items.description: Flow diagram — ranked nodes connected by throughput-sized link ribbons.

items.name: chart-scatter-chart
items.description: Scatter plot with variable point radius, multi-series, and hover tooltip.

items.name: chart-sparkline
items.description: Compact inline sparkline for embedding trend data in dashboards or KPI cards.

items.name: chart-stream
items.description: Streamgraph — stacked areas on a centered (silhouette) flowing baseline.

items.name: chart-sunburst
items.description: Radial hierarchy — concentric rings where each node is an annular segment sized by value.

items.name: chart-treemap
items.description: Squarified treemap for visualizing part-to-whole hierarchical data.

items.name: chat-bubble
items.description: Message bubble for chat and messaging UIs with avatar, name, and timestamp support

items.name: checkbox
items.description: Binary toggle for forms, with indeterminate support

items.name: checkbox-card
items.description: Multi-selectable card backed by a native checkbox. Use multiple independent CheckboxCards for multi-select scenarios.

items.name: code
items.description: Inline code span for identifiers, commands, and short snippets

items.name: code-snippet
items.description: Displays code (inline, single-line, or multi-line) with an optional copy button, lightweight built-in syntax highlighting for bash/css/js/ts, and an optional terminal-window look

items.name: collapsible
items.description: A single disclosure region toggled open and closed by its trigger

items.name: color-picker
items.description: Interactive color selection widget with saturation/lightness area, hue and alpha sliders

items.name: combobox
items.description: Filterable single-select with an animated custom listbox, built on the dropdown open/close machine

items.name: command-menu
items.description: Cmd+K command palette with fuzzy search over grouped commands

items.name: comparison
items.description: Reveals the difference between two layers with a draggable divider

items.name: contained-list
items.description: Labelled list of rows inside a bordered container

items.name: context-menu
items.description: Right-click context menu anchored at pointer coordinates via CSS custom properties

items.name: copy-button
items.description: Icon button that copies a value to the clipboard with copied feedback

items.name: data-list
items.description: Key-value pairs rendered as a description list

items.name: data-table
items.description: Signal-driven data table with client/server sort, filter, pagination, multi-selection, expandable rows, and CSS content-visibility row containment for large datasets

items.name: date-picker
items.description: An accessible date-picker with a calendar popover.

items.name: date-range-picker
items.description: A dual-calendar picker for selecting a contiguous date range.

items.name: dock
items.description: Fixed bottom navigation bar for mobile app shells with up to 5 items

items.name: drawer
items.description: Edge-anchored dialog panel that slides in from a screen edge with CSS-only enter/exit motion

items.name: dropdown
items.description: Menu of actions revealed from a trigger

items.name: editable
items.description: Inline click-to-edit text field

items.name: editor-code-editor
items.description: Lightweight code editor — a native textarea overlaid on a syntax-highlighted layer, with line numbers and Tab indent.

items.name: editor-highlight
items.description: Read-only syntax-highlighted code block — the same owned tokenizer as CodeEditor, without the textarea.

items.name: empty-state
items.description: Placeholder for views that have no data to display

items.name: fab
items.description: Floating action button anchored to a screen corner, with an optional speed-dial of secondary actions

items.name: field
items.description: Form-field wrapper composing label, control, description, and error

items.name: file-uploader
items.description: Drag-and-drop file upload zone with file list and status indicators.

items.name: filter
items.description: A group of toggleable pill or outline buttons for filtering content by category

items.name: flow-flow
items.description: The declarative, AI-first flow surface — render a node/edge graph from plain serializable data.

items.name: flow-flow-background
items.description: Decorative dots / grid / cross canvas background, drawn purely in CSS gradients.

items.name: flow-flow-canvas
items.description: The pan/zoom canvas pane — a single CSS-transformed layer driven by the viewport signal.

items.name: flow-flow-controls
items.description: Zoom in / out / fit-view controls for a flow canvas — real, i18n-labeled buttons.

items.name: flow-flow-edge
items.description: An SVG edge with bezier/straight/smoothstep paths, an arrowhead, an optional label, and animation.

items.name: flow-flow-handle
items.description: A connection port on a node edge — where edges attach and interactive connect starts.

items.name: flow-flow-minimap
items.description: A scaled SVG overview of the graph with a draggable viewport rectangle.

items.name: flow-flow-node
items.description: An HTML node box positioned in the viewport pane — draggable, selectable, with arbitrary children.

items.name: flow-flow-panel
items.description: An absolutely-positioned slot for custom flow-canvas UI (legend, toolbar).

items.name: flow-flow-story
items.description: A scripted, sequenced, looping flow animation — walks a graph step by step with fade-in captions.

items.name: form
items.description: Typed signal-based form store (createForm/useForm) with sync/async validation and a thin Form element wrapper

items.name: header
items.description: App top bar with brand, primary navigation links, and an actions slot

items.name: header-panel
items.description: Non-modal panel anchored below the shell header at the inline-end edge — hosts notifications, app switcher, user settings

items.name: heading
items.description: Section heading with semantic level decoupled from visual size

items.name: hover-card
items.description: Hover-triggered popover with configurable open/close delay

items.name: icon-button
items.description: Square, icon-only button with a required accessible label

items.name: image
items.description: Image with load state, blur-up placeholder, graceful fallback, and optional zoom

items.name: indicator
items.description: Positions an overlay element (badge, dot, count) at a corner of its child

items.name: inline-loading
items.description: Compact inline status indicator that pairs a label with a loading, success, or error state

items.name: input
items.description: Text input field with optional label, hint, and error state

items.name: input-group
items.description: Prefix/suffix addon wrapper for Input; InputGroupAddon renders inline icons/units inside the field border; ButtonGroup collapses adjacent button borders

items.name: item
items.description: Generic content row primitive with media, content, and action regions

items.name: join
items.description: Groups adjacent children into a seamless joined element by removing interior borders and radii

items.name: kbd
items.description: Displays a keyboard key or shortcut

items.name: label
items.description: Accessible caption for a form control

items.name: layout-app-shell
items.description: Full-page application shell with persisted collapsible sidebar. Includes a signal-driven top progress bar with determinate progress, error state, and dismissible error strip.

items.name: layout-auth-layout
items.description: Centered card layout for authentication pages (login, register, forgot password).

items.name: layout-auto-grid
items.description: Media-query-free responsive grid — columns auto-fill based on available space.

items.name: layout-center
items.description: Horizontally centered container with a configurable max-width.

items.name: layout-columns
items.description: Equal-width multi-column layout that collapses to single column on narrow viewports.

items.name: layout-dashboard-layout
items.description: Dashboard page layout with stats strip, main content area, and optional aside.

items.name: layout-flex
items.description: Flex layout primitive for vertical or horizontal stacking with gap control.

items.name: layout-grid
items.description: CSS grid layout primitive with responsive column collapsing. Establishes its own containment, so responsive `cols` adapt to the grid’s own slot width with no wrapper or container ancestor required.

items.name: layout-masonry
items.description: Masonry layout — native CSS masonry where supported, multi-column fallback elsewhere (fallback orders items top-to-bottom per column).

items.name: layout-page-header
items.description: Page-level header with title, description, breadcrumb, and actions slots.

items.name: layout-section
items.description: Page-section shell with block padding, centered inner width, and stack gap.

items.name: layout-settings-layout
items.description: Two-column settings page layout with a fixed-width menu and fluid content area.

items.name: layout-spacer
items.description: Fixed-height spacing block using design token steps.

items.name: layout-split-view
items.description: Resizable two-pane split layout with keyboard and pointer drag support.

items.name: link
items.description: Styled anchor for navigation, standalone or inline within prose

items.name: list
items.description: Styled unordered or ordered list with ListItem

items.name: log-viewer
items.description: Virtualized monospace console for high-frequency log and stream output

items.name: menu
items.description: Dropdown menu with keyboard navigation, built on usePopover

items.name: menu-button
items.description: A button that opens an anchored action menu of one-shot commands

items.name: menubar
items.description: Horizontal application menu bar with keyboard-navigable dropdown menus

items.name: modal
items.description: Accessible dialog overlay using native <dialog> element

items.name: multi-select
items.description: Searchable multi-value select with popover listbox

items.name: native-select
items.description: A styled native <select> that keeps platform form/keyboard behavior with a custom chevron and focus ring

items.name: navigation-menu
items.description: Site navigation bar with links and dropdown flyout panels

items.name: notification
items.description: Inline, actionable notification banner that surfaces a titled message with an optional recovery action

items.name: number-input
items.description: Numeric input with stepper buttons, clamping, precision, and locale formatting

items.name: otp-input
items.description: Segmented one-time code input

items.name: overflow-menu
items.description: Kebab icon button revealing a menu of row-level actions

items.name: pagination
items.description: Controls for navigating paged data sets, with page size selection

items.name: password-input
items.description: Password input with reveal toggle and optional strength meter

items.name: popover
items.description: Anchored floating panel built on CSS Anchor Positioning + Popover API

items.name: progress
items.description: Horizontal bar showing the completion progress of a tracked operation

items.name: progress-bar
items.description: Shows determinate or indeterminate progress of a task

items.name: progress-circle
items.description: Circular determinate progress indicator rendered as an SVG arc

items.name: progress-indicator
items.description: Shows progress through the steps of a multi-step flow

items.name: prose
items.description: Wrapper that styles raw descendant HTML — headings, lists, code, quotes, tables

items.name: pull-to-refresh
items.description: Wraps a scrollable region and triggers a refresh when pulled down past a threshold at the top

items.name: qr-code
items.description: Encodes a URL or short text into a scannable SVG QR code

items.name: radial-progress
items.description: Circular progress indicator using conic-gradient, with percentage label and variant colors

items.name: radio
items.description: Single choice from a set, grouped with RadioGroup

items.name: radio-card
items.description: Selectable card backed by a native radio input. Use RadioCardGroup for single-select groups.

items.name: rating-group
items.description: Star rating input with accessible radio group pattern

items.name: relative-time
items.description: Displays a date as a localized phrase relative to now, auto-updating

items.name: resizable
items.description: Two-pane splitter whose divider can be dragged or keyboard-nudged to reallocate space

items.name: scroll-area
items.description: A scroll container with styled, slim scrollbars and overflow shadows

items.name: search
items.description: Search input with debounced search callback and clear button

items.name: section-cta
items.description: Call-to-action band — quiet hairline-bordered section with title, description, and centered actions. Replace demo content before shipping.

items.name: section-feature-grid
items.description: Feature section — AutoGrid of items with optional title, description, and icon slots. Icons are optional; the grid works text-only. Replace demo content before shipping.

items.name: section-hero
items.description: Page hero section — centered or split layout with eyebrow, title, description, actions and media slots. Replace demo content before shipping.

items.name: section-media-masonry
items.description: Masonry gallery section — native CSS masonry where supported, multi-column fallback elsewhere (fallback orders tiles top-to-bottom per column). Tiles style themselves; section provides only the layout shell.

items.name: section-page-footer
items.description: Site footer — AutoGrid of link groups with a brand/meta bottom row. Renders a <footer> element with a <nav aria-label="Footer"> wrapping the link columns.

items.name: section-stats-band
items.description: KPI strip — horizontal band of stats with optional delta and inline sparkline trend. Wraps via AutoGrid on narrow containers. No visible heading; provide aria-label for accessibility.

items.name: segmented-control
items.description: Mutually exclusive toggle group

items.name: select
items.description: Native select menu styled to match the design system

items.name: separator
items.description: Visual or semantic divider between content

items.name: sheet
items.description: Slide-in panel from any edge, using popover=manual and @starting-style animations

items.name: shell-header
items.description: Console application header: brand with prefix, dropdown nav menus, global icon actions, hamburger, skip-to-content

items.name: side-nav
items.description: Collapsible sidebar navigation with optional icons and one level of grouping

items.name: skeleton
items.description: Animated loading placeholder that mirrors the shape of pending content

items.name: skip-nav
items.description: Skip link that jumps keyboard users past the navigation to the main content

items.name: slider
items.description: Range input for selecting a value within bounds

items.name: spinner
items.description: Indeterminate loading indicator

items.name: stack
items.description: Overlaps children in a CSS grid stack with a configurable offset to create a card-pile effect

items.name: stat
items.description: Displays a key metric with optional delta, trend direction and help text

items.name: status
items.description: Colored dot with a label communicating the state of a system or entity

items.name: steps
items.description: Visual progress indicator for multi-step flows with horizontal and vertical orientations

items.name: structured-list
items.description: Tabular row list for scannable data, optionally single-selectable

items.name: swap
items.description: Animated toggle between two icon/content states with rotate or flip transition

items.name: swipe-item
items.description: List row whose leading/trailing actions are revealed by a horizontal swipe, with keyboard parity

items.name: switcher
items.description: App/product switcher list — lives inside HeaderPanel, renders links with active indicator and optional dividers

items.name: tabs
items.description: Switch between related panels of content

items.name: tag
items.description: Compact chip for labeling, categorizing, or filtering content

items.name: tags-input
items.description: Free-form multi-value chip input

items.name: text
items.description: Body text with size, weight, and muted variants

items.name: textarea
items.description: Multi-line text input with optional label, hint, and error state

items.name: tile
items.description: A selectable card with radio (single) or checkbox (multi) semantics, toggled by click or keyboard

items.name: time-picker
items.description: Native time input wrapper with label, hint, error, and size variants

items.name: timeline
items.description: Ordered sequence of events with status markers and a connector line

items.name: toast
items.description: Transient notification surfaced via the useToast hook

items.name: toc
items.description: Table of contents with scroll-spy highlighting of the active section

items.name: toggle
items.description: On/off switch built as an accessible button

items.name: toggle-group
items.description: A set of toggle buttons for single or multiple selection

items.name: toggletip
items.description: A click-triggered info popover for supplementary, selectable content

items.name: tooltip
items.description: Contextual label shown on hover or focus

items.name: tree-view
items.description: Hierarchical, expandable tree of nodes with keyboard navigation and selection

items.name: user
items.description: Identity composite: an avatar with a name, description, and optional action slot

items.name: visually-hidden
items.description: Hides content visually while keeping it available to screen readers
